allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; nb=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''Cell {i} id={c.get\(""id"",""none""\)}: {c[""source""][0][:80] if c[""source""] else ""\(empty\)""}''''\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb[''''cells'''']\) if any\(''''target_name'''' in line for line in c.get\(''''source'''',[]\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; nb=json.load\(sys.stdin\); src=nb[''''cells''''][3][''''source'''']; [print\(line,end=''''''''\) for line in src if ''''CONFIGURATION'''' in line or ''''file_path'''' in line or ''''target_name'''' in line or ''''endpoint_name'''' in line or ''''num_classes'''' in line or ''''====='''' in line]")
